query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "does vla even know the basics? measuring commonsense and world knowled" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (f) as it directly addresses the mechanism of "commonsense" evaluation in AI systems, which is the core subject of the user's question regarding "Commonsense and World Knowledge" in VLAs. Although the paper focuses on the methodology of benchmarking and ontology rather than the specific VLA results of the user's target paper, it provides the canonical framework and vocabulary for the domain of commonsense QA that a literature review on this topic must cite.
